cases.readme:
# Project

## Installation
```bash
pip install -e .
conda env create -f environment.yml
```

## Usage
```bash
python scripts/txt2img.py --prompt "a cat"
```

# Project

## Checkpoints
```bash
mkdir -p models/foo
wget https://example.com/model.ckpt
```

## Inference
```bash
python scripts/amg.py --checkpoint model.ckpt --model-type vit_b --input input.jpg --output out
```
cases.expected_command: python scripts/amg.py --checkpoint model.ckpt --model-type vit_b --input input.jpg --output out

cases.readme:
# Whisper

## Setup
```bash
pip install setuptools-rust
```

## Usage
```bash
whisper audio.wav --model turbo
whisper --help
```
